notes: Manual metadata-only review for the first wall-fixture shortlist. Decisions are conservative because real geometry has not been downloaded or inspected yet.

decisions.title: Victorian Framed Painting - PBR Game Ready
decisions.reason: Strong wall-art semantics, isolated framed painting presentation, and a low-poly profile that looks suitable for an initial additive fixture slice.

decisions.title: Wooden Wall Clock
decisions.reason: Clear wall-clock semantics, explicit real-world size on the source page, and a visually generic style appropriate for living-room enrichment.
